_rationale: Enforces cryptographic commit signing and protects default-branch integrity against force-push and deletion.

_rule_descriptions.required_signatures: All commits must be GPG or SSH signed, proving commit provenance and making unauthorized history modifications detectable.
_rule_descriptions.non_fast_forward: Prevents force-pushes that rewrite history on the protected branch — existing signed commits cannot be silently replaced.
_rule_descriptions.deletion: Prevents accidental or malicious deletion of the protected branch.

name: signed-commits
